name: Set Up and Run a Complete EEG Data Recording Session
description: You are a research lab assistant responsible for running an EEG data collection session for a cognitive neuroscience study. Configure the OpenBCI GUI for a Synthetic EEG session using a 4-panel display layout featuring Time Series, Band Power, FFT Plot, and Accelerometer widgets. Apply a 1–50 Hz bandpass filter and a 60 Hz notch filter, and enable Expert Mode. Capture an EEG data recording to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/, ensuring the final file contains recorded data. Document the active recording session with a screenshot and save the session configuration to a settings file.

metadata.persona: Research lab assistant / EEG data collection technician
